title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED

chunks.text:
H. No. 5584 / 58 OG No. 16, 3325 (April 16, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3308, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (b), paragraph II, page 218, Section 2-f, of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred is amended to read as follows:

"(b) Orense Park, Bauan Construction and/or improvement

P10,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
